text_excerpt: News - Pippa Heylings MP Skip to main content Pippa Heylings MP About me Climate Champion My Campaigns News Contact me Volunteer for Pippa Heylings Newsletter Donate Join Donate Join My Campaigns Urgent petition to fix our roads Reverse Labour cuts to Holiday Food Vouchers Save palliative care beds at Arthur Rank Hospices Fix our local health services Protect our environment in South Cambs Urgent action on the cost of living Fairer Funding for Cambridgeshire GPs Contact me Privacy Policy News from Pippa Heylings MP Chalk Streams (UNESCO Natural World Heritage Site) Bill Watch or read Pippa's speech to parliament for her proposed Chalk Streams (UNESCO Natural World Heritage Site) Bill 24 Feb 2026 View Cambridgeshire Liberal Democrats demand Labour U-Turn after government scrap funding for holiday food vouchers for families in need Cambridgeshire Liberal Democrats have condemned the Labour Government's decision to scrap the existing funding for holiday food vouchers, and are demanding Labour act now to protect this vital support package for those struggling to put food on the table 2 Feb 2026 View Pippa leads cross-party MP call on Keir to support Topical Forest Fund Pippa and more than 60 MPs and peers have called on Keir Starmer to back the Tropical Forests Forever Facility (TFFF) to show strong UK leadership after COP30 21 Nov 2025 View Arthur Rank Hospice: Cambridgeshire MPs call on the government to restore vital funding Our three Lib Dem MPs for Cambridgeshire have written to Wes Streeting requesting urgent government funding for the threatened Arthur Rank Hospice beds 1 Oct 2025 View Pippa speaks up for Hong Kong BN(O) visa holders in South Cambs Speaking in a Westminster Hall debate this week, Pippa called on the Government to protect the five-year route to settlement for Hong Kong BN(O) visa holders 11 Sep 2025 View Why the Tories are wrong on North Sea oil and gas Watch Pippa's video explaing how Kemi Badenoch is wrong about North SE oil and gas, and why the Lib Dems' position on energy security is the only sensible way forward 3 Sep 2025 View 1 2 3 4 5 … 8 Older news stories about Pippa from before the 2024 General Election can be found on the South Cambridgeshire Liberal Democrats site here Please consider a donation to help Pippa's campaign Donate The Liberal Democrats will use your contact details to send you information on the topics you have requested. Any data we gather will be used in accordance with our privacy policy at www.libdems.org.uk/privacy . To exercise your legal data rights, email: data.protection@libdems.org.uk . We take accessibility and your data privacy seriously. Read our accessibility statement and cookie policy . Promoted by the Liberal Democrats , First Floor, 66 Buckingham Gate, London SW1E 6AU. Website by Prater Raines . This website uses cookies Please select the types of cookies you want to allow. Essential These are necessary for the website to function properly. Analytics These help us to understand how our visitors use our website. Marketing These allow us to display content from other websites that track you for advertising purposes.
